product.name: Verbatim
product.description: Chrome extension that helps users pressure-test important AI responses before relying on them.
product.wedge: Pressure-test AI conclusions before sending client-facing work.

primaryHook: You don't know what you're missing. Find out before it costs you.
secondaryHook: You don't always have someone to push back. AI never does.
bodyCopyOptions: You are reading an AI response. It sounds right. Then your confidence dips. Verbatim is what you do next.
Before a client sees the conclusion, pressure-test the answer. Verbatim shows what may be missing, overstated, or under-examined.
The problem is not that AI is always wrong. The problem is not knowing when to doubt it. Verbatim gives you a second pass before the work leaves your hands.

brand.name: Verbatim
brand.brandLine: A.I. JUST GOT A BULLSHIT METER.
